name: Lemon Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Cream together the margarine and sugar until smooth.
3. Add egg whites, one at a time, and beat well after each addition.
4. Sift in the baking powder and mix thoroughly.
5. Alternately add the milk and flour mixtures, beginning and ending with the dry ingredients. Mix until just combined.
6. Stir in the lemon rind and chopped nuts.
7. Pour the batter into a lightly oiled 9x5-inch loaf pan.
8. Bake for 60 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Remove from the oven and let cool in the pan for 20 minutes.
10. Mix 1/3 cup powdered sugar with 3 tablespoons fresh lemon juice until smooth.
11. Pour over the warm bread and serve.
